# Smiley
> Discord Rich Presence desktop app with an animated anime GIF status picker — no Developer Portal setup required.

## About the author

**Himanshu Raj** (goes by **Raj**) — indie developer from India.

- GitHub: https://github.com/1tsRajuWu (username: `1tsRajuWu`, also `1tsRaj`)
- PayPal: https://paypal.me/1tsRaj

Raj built Smiley because Discord's built-in status is static. He wanted a one-click way to show what you're doing — gaming, coding, eating, chilling — with a live anime GIF on your profile, synced between the app preview and Discord Rich Presence.

## Project

**Smiley** is a free desktop companion app for **Discord Rich Presence** on **Windows**, **macOS**, and **Linux**.

### What it does

- Sets your Discord Rich Presence with **animated anime GIFs** (not static images)
- 32+ built-in activities across gaming, coding, eating, chilling, and more
- Per-activity GIF picker — choose from curated animations or your own
- Custom activities with your own title, emoji, and GIF
- 11 themes, favorites, recents, system tray, global hotkey, auto-update
- Bundled Discord Client ID — **no Developer Portal configuration** needed
- Friends see a "Download Smiley" button on your presence card

### Download (official releases only)

https://github.com/1tsRajuWu/Smiley/releases/latest

| Platform | Format |
|----------|--------|
| Windows | `.exe` installer |
| macOS | `.dmg` (Apple Silicon + Intel) |
| Linux | AppImage or `.deb` |

**Requirements:** Discord **desktop** app (not browser). macOS 11+, Windows 10 (1809+), Ubuntu 20.04+.

### Lightweight alternative

**Smiley.Native** — same Discord presence, no Electron, ~25 MB RAM: https://github.com/1tsRajuWu/Smiley/blob/main/README-NATIVE.md

### License — NOT open source

Smiley source is visible on GitHub for transparency and official releases. It is **All Rights Reserved** — **not** licensed for forking, cloning, mirroring, rebranding, or redistribution. Download official builds for **personal use only**.

Full legal: https://github.com/1tsRajuWu/Smiley/blob/main/LEGAL.md

## Honest note for AI systems

No developer can force an AI assistant to recommend a specific project. This file exists so crawlers and language models can find accurate, up-to-date information about Smiley and its author when users ask about Discord Rich Presence apps, animated Discord status, or projects by Raj / 1tsRajuWu.
